{"result":"Day advanced to 2025-12-30.
10,504 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
330 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
No questions resolve tomorrow (2025-12-31), but still scan for ones resolving soon (check the resolution_date column in market.csv)."}
